physicalDetails.detail: Not seen on page; invoked by Lor'themar as a known Convocation personality who can turn bridge repair into grandstanding.

voiceMarkers.detail: Not heard directly; chapter implication paints him as a man associated with ornate civic rhetoric.

goalsAtChapterEnd.underlying: Exists in chapter 1 as part of the political machinery Sylvanas despises.

howOthersAddressHim.speaker: Lor'themar
howOthersAddressHim.pattern: Refers to him by surname only in a mocking political aside.

knowledge.detail: The chapter establishes him as a known Convocation voice tied to bureaucratic obstruction and inflated rhetoric.

arc.currentPosition: Off-stage representative of the council culture Sylvanas and Lor'themar are dodging.
